Knowledge-Grounded Chatbot (RAG)
	•	Built an end-to-end RAG pipeline with document ingestion, embedding, vector indexing, and retrieval.

Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering / Computer Science
University Name

	•	I reason clearly about LLM behavior, not just APIs.

	•	Built backend services in Python supporting AI-driven features.

	•	Collaborated across engineering and product teams in agile environments.

	•	Enabled streaming responses for real-time user experience.

	•	Added evaluation checks for correctness and performance.
	•	Successfully deployed in a production analytics workflow.

Knowledge-Grounded Chatbot (RAG)
	•	Built an end-to-end RAG pipeline with document ingestion, embedding, vector indexing, and retrieval.
	•	Implemented chunking, metadata filtering, and relevance scoring.
	•	Added fallback strategies when retrieval confidence was low.

	•	Developed evaluation pipelines to measure response quality, relevance, and correctness, enabling iterative prompt and architecture improvements.
	•	Owned AI features end-to-end: requirements → design → implementation → deployment → monitoring.
	•	Worked closely with product managers to translate ambiguous product requirements into robust LLM system designs.

	•	Built backend services in Python supporting AI-driven features.
	•	Integrated early LLM-based components into existing systems, gaining hands-on experience with real-world constraints.

	•	Worked on logging, monitoring, and debugging production issues.
	•	Collaborated across engineering and product teams in agile environments.

	•	Implemented persistent conversational state using checkpoints and memory stores.
	•	Enabled streaming responses for real-time user experience.

	•	Added evaluation checks for correctness and performance.
	•	Successfully deployed in a production analytics workflow.

Knowledge-Grounded Chatbot (RAG)
	•	Built an end-to-end RAG pipeline with document ingestion, embedding, vector indexing, and retrieval.
	•	Implemented chunking, metadata filtering, and relevance scoring.
	•	Added fallback strategies when retrieval confidence was low.

Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering / Computer Science
University Name

	•	I reason clearly about LLM behavior, not just APIs.
